design_philosophy: Confident, technical, concise. Developer-to-developer. Deep dark base with soft radial glows, premium glassmorphic surfaces, and striking teal/amber accents to stand out from generic purple SaaS themes.

glassmorphism_recipe.terminal_panel: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 shadow-2xl relative overflow-hidden

motion_and_interactions.hero_glow_drift: animate-pulse (slow 8s) or Framer Motion floating keyframes

sections_blueprint.name: Hero
sections_blueprint.layout: Grid 1x2 or Stacked. If stacked: text center, terminal below.
components: Primary CTA (Amber bg, black text, rounded-lg)
Secondary CTA (Glass button, teal hover text)
Floating Glass Terminal (Live typing SDK, mac window controls, deep blur behind)
sections_blueprint.background_glow: Absolute positioned divs with blur-[120px]. Teal on left/top, Amber on right/bottom. Opacity 15%.

sections_blueprint.name: Features Bento
items: AI Backend Gen (col-span-2 row-span-2, glowing teal border, interactive prompt UI)

sections_blueprint.name: Code Examples
sections_blueprint.layout: Split section: Left text, Right Tabbed Editor

sections_blueprint.name: AI Spotlight
sections_blueprint.layout: Centered showcase. Prompt input -> Arrow -> Code Output panel.
sections_blueprint.styling: Heavy use of Amber highlight for the 'magic' AI action.

sections_blueprint.name: Integrations
sections_blueprint.layout: Hexagon or staggered grid of icons.
sections_blueprint.styling: Glass tiles, hover illuminates the specific brand color of the integration.

sections_blueprint.name: Pricing
sections_blueprint.layout: Single centered wide card or 3-column with prominent Free tier.

sections_blueprint.name: Testimonials
sections_blueprint.layout: Marquee or Masonry grid of 6 cards

libraries: react-icons/si (Simple Icons for brand integrations like Vercel, Stripe, React, Go, Python)

images.description: Abstract green/teal light trails on dark background (Use as low-opacity 10% hero overlay or footer bg)
Code screen dark (Use as fallback or inside docs preview graphic if needed)

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme only. Do NOT add a light mode toggle.
Implement the background glows using absolutely positioned divs with `blur-[120px]` or `blur-[150px]`, `rounded-full`, and low opacity (10-20%) behind major sections (Hero, Pricing, AI Spotlight).
Use 'react-icons/si' for all brand logos in the Logos Strip and Integrations grid (e.g., SiVercel, SiSupabase, SiReact, SiPython).
For the Bento grid, ensure items do NOT have a uniform shape. Use `col-span` and `row-span` to create asymmetry as defined in the layout.
The primary CTA buttons MUST be the Amber highlight (#F59E0B) with black text for maximum contrast and hierarchy.
Ensure the Glassmorphism surfaces have `backdrop-blur-xl` and a 1px border (`border-white/10`). Remove default Shadcn Card backgrounds and apply this glass recipe.
Headings must use the 'Outfit' font. Add `@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@400;600;700;800&display=swap');` to index.css.
Code snippets and the Hero terminal must use 'JetBrains Mono' font. Import it similarly.
Inject `data-testid` into all CTAs, Tabs, Accordion toggles, and Form inputs.
Use Framer Motion to stagger the reveal of Bento cards and Testimonials.
